item.name: Wind-up Red Mage
item.description:
He'd rather be red than dead.

Use item to acquire the wind-up red mage minion.
item.tooltip:
A red mage must strive to
achieve the greatest good.
   - X'rhun Tia
item.specialactiondescription:
Increases movement speed of all allies within range by 35%.
Duration: 6s
